title: dryopteris subgranulosa
intro: Dryopteris subgranulosa, also known as the mountain male fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris subgranulosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction for its medicinal purposes, although modern research is still necessary to fully understand its potential benefits and applications.
